arts.ttl: Report: Patrick Dorgu was not Ruben Amorim’s first choice, Inter star derails plans with transfer decision
arts.sum: Federico Dimarco told Manchester United that he was very happy at Inter during the January transfer window. A report from FCInterNews reveals that Ruben Amorim is a huge admirer of the full-back and even attempted to sign him during the January transfer window. arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen superstar Florian Wirtz has rejected a summer move to Manchester United, according to reports in Spain. However, the Red Devils have seen their first offer for Wirtz rejected by the Bayer Leverkusen midfielder, according to El Nacional .
